function toWordList(words) {
  var ret = [];
  words.split(' ').forEach(function(e){
    ret.push({name: e});
  });
  return ret;
}

function searchWordList (wordList, word) {
  var i;
  for (i = wordList.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (wordList[i].name === word.toUpperCase()) {
      return wordList[i];
    }
  }
  return undefined;
}
